title: Non-linear Dynamics (2ND)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent; MAM1043H; MAM1044H; MAM2010F and MAM2011F.

outline: Topics include: fixed points, bifurcations, phase portraits; conservative and reversible systems; index theory, Poincaré–Bendixson theorem, Liénard systems, relaxation oscillators; Hopf bifurcations, quasiperiodicity and Poincaré maps; applications including chaos on a strange attractor, Lorentz map, logistic map, Hénon map; Lyapunov exponents; fractals.
dp_requirements: A class record of 30% or more; satisfactory attendance at lectures and tutorials; submission of all assigned work.
assessment: Class record counts up to 50%; the balance is made up by the final examination.
